tasks_completed.description: Added spec-continuation-of marker instruction to continuation-spec mode section of commands/spec-update.md
tasks_completed.changes: Inserted 10-line paragraph between cycle-number determination and 8-section template list (lines 54-61). Instruction directs the agent to: (1) check idempotently for existing marker by resolved task-id, (2) write the marker as the first line of the new cycle block if absent, (3) never write literal placeholder forms, (4) restrict behavior to continuation-spec mode only.
tasks_completed.rationale: Root cause: commit aea75d9 tightened commit.md Stage 3 content predicate to grep for this exact marker, but no corresponding producer-side instruction was added to spec-update.md. Zero specs carry the marker; Stage 3 always returns empty set and exits 0 silently.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: aea75d9 — chore(docs): ship cycle 20260522-000000 close-report and QA verification
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Consumer side (commit.md Stage 3) was updated to grep for a machine-readable marker to reduce false positives, but the producer side (spec-update.md) was not updated to write the marker. Documented as W3 warning in close-report-20260522-080646.md.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: The new instruction in spec-update.md continuation-spec mode ensures every future cycle block is preceded by the exact marker string that commit.md Stage 3 greps for, making Stage 3 discovery functional for all future cycles.

blast_radius.impact_note: Change is purely additive prose instruction. No code executed. All callers continue to work; the new step is an additional action before existing section population.

dev.qa_notes: AC4 is static-verifiable: grep -n 'spec-continuation-of' commands/spec-update.md returns line 55 only; section boundaries are ## Continuation-spec mode at line 31 and ## Temp-note mode at line 93. AC1/AC2/AC3/AC5 require a live spec-update continuation run with an active task-id to exercise the instruction against a real spec file.

self_verification.notes: Static AC4 check confirmed: grep -n 'spec-continuation-of' commands/spec-update.md returns line 55 only. Line 55 falls between ## Continuation-spec mode (line 31) and ## Temp-note mode (line 93). Temp section (lines 93-133) contains no spec-continuation-of text. No build step applicable (Markdown instruction file only).

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex exec entered interactive mode (prompt was passed as a shell variable but codex did not receive it as an argument); output showed only the interactive ready prompt with no analysis. Self-review substituted.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Self-review substituted: 5 adversarial questions answered — (1) marker string matches commit.md grep when substituted correctly: PASS; (2) 'first line of new cycle block' placement is unambiguous: PASS; (3) idempotency check correctly scoped per-(task-id, spec file): PASS; (4) no scope drift or over-engineering (10 lines of Markdown prose, no code): PASS; (5) additive instruction only, no regression risk to existing spec-update usage: PASS.

recommendations: Retroactively add the marker to the 4 existing spec files (spec-20260517-210806.md, spec-20260518-225715.md, spec-20260520-044700.md, spec-20260520-221059.md) in a separate cycle if those specs need to participate in Stage 3 discovery for any active task-id
